pdb.parquet · grain model · plugin extensions · chunked execution
each unit: run(ctx) → rows · available(ctx) → (bool, reason)
• Loads each structure from prepared cache
• plan_plugin_waves() groups plugins → waves → CPU ‖ GPU concurrent groups
scheduling logic lives in core/_schedule.py; execution logic in core/_execute.py
• Left-joins each plugin output on identity key columns
validates: no duplicate identity rows · no overlapping column names
• Reads final pdb.parquet, filters rows by grain
Splits input_dir into N independent chunk runs.
Each chunk runs the full prepare → execute → merge cycle.
merge-datasets stacks all chunks → final dataset.
Per-structure checks that annotate rows without changing coordinates.
Runs first, before any coordinate transforms.
Per-structure coordinate transforms. May mutate ctx.aa.
plugins. dataset_manipulation class removed — use pdb_calculation instead.
into the shared pdb table. grain attr selects the output scope.

Post-merge analyses over the full dataset (aggregate statistics).
Returns a DataFrame; rows stacked into dataset.parquet.
name = "" # unique identifier within its class
def run(ctx) # yields row dicts / returns DataFrame
Register via setuptools entry_points or extend registries in-process.
Prefix collision and name collision are rejected at registry load time.
pdb.parquet — unified output table (grain column discriminates rows)
Each plugin defines a unique prefix (e.g. prefix="iface") → "iface__n_contacts".
Prefix collision is caught at registry load. Overlapping columns rejected at merge.
path # absolute path to source structure file
Adds plugin columns to base rows.
core/_schedule.py # plan_plugin_waves, wave groups, resource metadata
core/_execute.py # task dispatch, worker init, group runners
Expensive structure I/O happens once. All plugin stages
prefix__column naming guarantees zero namespace collision.
Registry rejects duplicate names and prefixes at load time.
Dataset merge stacks rows without schema change
Chunked outputs are concatenated. Identity key uniqueness is
Normalized tabular outputs around one table
One pdb.parquet with grain column unifies structure/chain/
role/interface rows. All grains share the same identity schema.
Compatible plugins grouped into waves. CPU and GPU groups in
the same wave execute concurrently via a thread-per-pool model.
Plain YAML. Config validated via pydantic on load. Extra fields
